title: Scott Valcourt Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Scott Valcourt Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Scott Valcourt
Khoury Faculty
PhD in Engineering, University of New Hampshire
Portland Campus
In college, Scott Valcourt fell in love with using computer science and math to solve real-world problems. Now a professor at Khoury College, he teaches students computer science fundamentals to encourage them to tackle new everyday problems outside of class.
It means a lot to me when a student comes back to me and says, ‘You know that thing you taught us how to do in SQL programming? I’m using that at my company right now, and if you hadn’t taught me that, I wouldn’t be as successful there as I am now.’ And that’s a pretty powerful thing
Scott Valcourt, Associate Teaching Professor
Explore all Khoury Stories
